name: academorix/referrals
purpose: Referral programme — Referral tracked-instance, ReferralCode distributable link, ReferralProgram config, ReferralReward payout, and ReferralFraudFlag detection.
capabilities: Referral tracked referrer × referred × program × code row
ReferralCode distributable code mapping inbound clicks
ReferralReward per-referral reward record with payout
when_to_use: Rolling out a refer-a-friend programme with reward tracking, fraud detection, and referrer credit.
when_not_to_use: For cold-lead intake from marketing forms, use the sibling academorix/leads package.
